app_name.description: The name of the app displayed in the Canva marketplace

search_placeholder.defaultMessage: A word, a mood, a concept...
search_placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the main search input field

find_fonts_button.description: Label for the button that triggers font search

save_key_button.description: Label for the button that saves the API key

api_key_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the API key input field

apply_to_design.description: Button label to apply a recommended font to the current Canva design

match_detail.description: Label for the collapsible section showing how well a font matches the input

reading_meaning.description: Status message shown while the app is processing the user input

typefaces_for.description: Part of the results status message

enter_api_key.description: Error message when no API key is saved

saved.description: Confirmation shown after API key is saved

tagline.defaultMessage: Describe your vision. Get the perfect typeface.
tagline.description: App tagline shown in the header
